name: services Report
query:
SELECT 
    S.patient AS "Patient:Data:100", 
    P.patient_name AS "Patient Name:Data:250", 
    P.mobile_no AS "Mobile No:Data:150",
    P.p_age as "Age",
    P.age_type as "Age Type",
    S.posting_date AS "Date:Date:150", 
    COALESCE(S.ref_practitioner, S.oustside) AS "Doctor:Data:200", 
    I.item_code AS "Service Name:Data:250", 
    I.item_group AS "Service Type", 
     I.description AS "Description", 
    I.income_account AS "Income", 
    I.qty AS "Qty:Float:100",
    I.net_rate AS "Net Rate:Currency:120",
    I.net_amount AS "Net Amount:Currency:150"
FROM 
    `tabSales Invoice` S
JOIN 
    `tabSales Invoice Item` I ON S.name = I.parent
LEFT JOIN
    `tabPatient` P ON S.patient = P.name
WHERE 
    S.docstatus = 1
    AND S.posting_date BETWEEN %(Start_date)s AND %(End_date)s;
